# Abbreviations

```{python}
#| label: tbl-abbrevs
#| tbl-cap: "Table loaded from CSV file with pandas"

import pandas as pd
from IPython.display import Markdown, display

tab_data = pd.read_csv(
  "../resources/table_data/tbl-abbrev.csv",  # <-- adjust path if needed
  dtype={"value": str},
  keep_default_na=False
)

md_tab = tab_data.to_markdown(
    index=False,
    maxcolwidths=[None, 45, None],
)

display(Markdown(md_tab))
